profile.summary: Supply Chain Coordinator with 9 years of experience in inventory planning and distribution. Managed a network of 4 distribution centers and reduced average order-to-delivery lead time from 6.5 to 3.8 days.

experiences.title: Supply Chain Coordinator
experiences.description: Coordinated inventory and outbound logistics across a four-site distribution network.
achievements: Reduced average order-to-delivery lead time from 6.5 to 3.8 days by re-balancing inventory across 4 distribution centers.
Cut freight cost per shipment by 14 percent by consolidating carriers and renegotiating rate cards.
Improved inventory accuracy from 92 to 99 percent through a cycle-count program covering 8,000 SKUs.

experiences.title: Logistics Analyst
experiences.description: Analyzed transportation data and supported daily dispatch planning.
achievements: Planned around 40 daily shipments and reduced empty-mile rate from 18 to 11 percent through better backhaul scheduling.
Built a weekly KPI dashboard that improved on-time delivery tracking across a fleet of 30 vehicles.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Supply Chain Management

certificates.name: APICS Certified in Planning and Inventory Management (CPIM)

jobPosting.title: Supply Chain Manager
jobPosting.fullText: Cornerstone Distribution Networks is a third-party logistics provider with 600 employees operating 9 distribution centers across the Southeast. We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Charlotte hub. Responsibilities: manage inventory planning and distribution for a network serving over 500 retail locations, lead a team of 5 coordinators, drive cost and service-level improvements, and oversee the rollout of a new warehouse management system. Requirements: several years of supply-chain or logistics experience, strong command of ERP and WMS tools, demonstrated process-improvement results, and team-leadership experience. We offer a competitive salary, an annual bonus, and relocation assistance. Your point of contact is Ms. Linda Carrington, Director of Operations. Please indicate your earliest possible start date.
